human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to finish wiring require_document_type into document_designs.py/static_pdfs.py, or revert the uncommitted edit to document_types.py and restart /simplify fresh
human_actions_pending.context: Session ran out of context mid-fix; only 1 of 9 /simplify findings was partially applied and is uncommitted

decisions.decision: Versioning only begins after a design's first activation; pre-activation designs are edited directly (Phase 4 behavior, no forking)
decisions.rationale: Matches Phase 4's D-02/D-04 which already established draft/active lifecycle without version history

decisions.decision: In-progress draft versions appear in the Version History table with a 'Draft' badge
decisions.rationale: Extends UI-SPEC's table, which only explicitly covered Current/Superseded rows

decisions.decision: Only one in-flight draft allowed per design; re-clicking 'Edit Design' resumes the existing draft instead of creating a duplicate
decisions.rationale: Avoids orphaned drafts, simplest mental model

decisions.decision: Existing Phase 4 'active' designs migrate to 'Version 1/Current'; existing never-activated 'draft' designs stay version-less
decisions.rationale: Consistent with the first-activation start-point decision, avoids unnecessary migration complexity

decisions.decision: DB schema: extend document_designs table with version_group_id + version_number columns and two Postgres partial unique indexes (one WHERE status='active', one WHERE status='draft'), rather than a new versions table
decisions.rationale: Research finding — reuses existing DocumentDesignPage cascade pattern for forking, enforces 'unambiguous current' and 'one draft at a time' at the DB level

next_action: Decide on the /simplify partial edit (finish wiring or revert), then run /gsd:plan-phase 5 to resume — it will detect 05-RESEARCH.md already exists and proceed straight to spawning gsd-planner
context_notes: This session covered two threads that interleaved: (1) GSD phase-5 discuss+research flow, fully committed and clean; (2) an ad-hoc /simplify review of the already-committed Phase 4 diff, whose 4 review agents all finished with findings but application of fixes was cut short by context exhaustion after only the first fix (a shared require_document_type() helper) was written. The full findings list (not yet applied): (A) wire require_document_type into document_designs.py:89-91 and static_pdfs.py:47-51 [partially started]; (B) hoist duplicated jsonOrError/readErrorMessage from frontend/src/lib/documentDesigns.ts into frontend/src/lib/api.ts, import from content.ts and documentDesigns.ts; (C) fold repeated page-lookup-or-404 in document_designs.py's update_design_page/delete_design_page into a local _require_page(design, page_id) helper; (D) avoid re-querying via _require_design after mutation in create_document_design (line 103), reorder_design_pages (line 225), activate_document_design (line 279) — use the already-loaded/mutated design object with _detail(design) directly; (E) fix N+1 query in design_validation.py validate_design_activation (lines 58-67) — batch-fetch HtmlTemplate rows with one IN query instead of per-page; (F) list_document_designs uses selectinload(pages) + len(design.pages) just to compute page_count — replace with a SQL count aggregate; (G) memoize existingPdfIds in DocumentDesignDetailPage.tsx (passed into AddContentModal.tsx's useEffect deps) to avoid unnecessary refetches; (H) move the inline duplicate-PDF check in add_static_pdf_page (document_designs.py:188-192) into design_validation.py as assert_no_duplicate_static_pdf, alongside its sibling compatibility checks; (I) add a document_type_id server-side filter to list_html_templates (content_templates.py) matching list_static_pdf_assets, and simplify AddContentModal.tsx to call listHtmlTemplates(documentTypeId) instead of client-side filtering. None of B-I have been started. The docker-compose.yml, HtmlTemplateCreatePage.tsx, and new Dockerfiles are pre-existing uncommitted work from before this session (not touched by /simplify) — leave as-is, not part of this handoff's scope.
